requirements.description: Freeze protocol/API-v2 objects, domains, actions, payload tags, resolvers, light updates, transaction bounds, authorization, rollback, and genesis bootstrap.
requirements.threshold: Every W0 field, domain, bound, negative vector, and independent review is complete for one exact revision
requirements.observed: The contracts are specified, but no signed owner freeze or independent G0 review exists.

requirements.description: Bind the protocol-v2 ledger directly to the immutable final protocol-v1 blocker-ledger bytes without mutation or reinterpretation.
requirements.threshold: Exact predecessor bytes and root independently reviewed and signed into G0
requirements.observed: The exact V1 file root is recorded; independent signed acceptance is absent.

requirements.description: Sign all owner-controlled protocol-v2 identity, authority, production, economics, and deployment constants.
requirements.threshold: All OWNER_BLOCKED values resolved by signed exact-revision records
requirements.observed: Chain ID, genesis, role keyring, final freeze, economics, operators, and production origins remain OWNER_BLOCKED.

requirements.description: Complete independent protocol, cryptographic-domain, bounds, authorization, rollback, and mixed-version review.
requirements.threshold: Named independent reviewers reproduce every frozen contract and all negative vectors with no unresolved severity-1 finding
requirements.observed: No qualifying independent W0 review bundle is registered.

unresolved: Signed protocol-v2 identity and production constants

requirements.description: Canonical protocol-v2 vectors, mutation/fuzz, small-state, model/runtime, authorization, and cross-language lab evidence.
requirements.threshold: Zero false accepts, unauthorized transitions, identity/domain substitution, divergence, or irreproducible measurement
requirements.observed: G0 has not passed and no complete immutable G1 bundle exists.

requirements.description: Exact protocol-v2 independent devnet with two independently managed client/verifier families and no mixed-version peers.
requirements.threshold: All client pairings, restart, snapshot, proof, unknown-tag, oversize, mixed-peer, fuzz, WAN, and AI-off tests pass
requirements.observed: No qualifying external operators or immutable G2 bundle exists.

requirements.description: Open public adversarial protocol-v2 testnet at the exact G2 revision.
requirements.threshold: At least 90 uninterrupted real days for cryptographic/economic mechanisms and 30 real days for application mechanisms
requirements.observed: Zero qualifying public-testnet days are evidenced.

requirements.description: Base availability and finality remain live with every AI/model/executor process disabled.
requirements.threshold: Seven uninterrupted real public-testnet days; simulated time forbidden
requirements.observed: Zero qualifying AI-off days are evidenced.

requirements.description: Funded red team, fault drills, independent consensus/network/state/crypto audit and cryptanalysis.
requirements.threshold: All mandatory exact-revision reviews delivered with no gate-killing result
requirements.observed: No qualifying external assurance exists.

requirements.description: Publish the canonical protocol-v2 parameter manifest and complete Quiet Week.
requirements.threshold: At least seven uninterrupted published real days; any parameter change restarts the interval
requirements.observed: No signed parameter manifest, chain ID, or publication interval exists.

requirements.description: Select a published Bitcoin block only after Quiet Week completes.
requirements.threshold: Anchor follows the completed freeze and is independently verified
requirements.observed: No anchor is selected.

requirements.description: Complete signed multiparty production DKG after Quiet Week.
requirements.threshold: Valid multiparty ceremony, complaints, exclusions, erasure, and independently reproduced root
requirements.observed: No qualifying DKG participants or transcript exist.

requirements.description: Freeze signed production allocation, supply, issuance, bond, fee, and five-row WWM coverage policy.
requirements.threshold: Owner signatures, exhaustive conservation tests, independent economic review, and counsel
requirements.observed: Production economics are deliberately absent.

requirements.description: Independently reproduce final genesis and protocol-v2 bootstrap with all model execution off.
requirements.threshold: Matching genesis, roots, exactly one zero-money policy-bearing Current fund ledger, and live base finality
requirements.observed: Final genesis does not exist.

requirements.description: Capped-value opt-in canary with one-checkpoint disable and target-specific recovery.
requirements.threshold: At least 180 uninterrupted real days and exposure at most 10 bps
requirements.observed: Zero qualifying canary days exist.

requirements.description: Independent exit, blackout, recovery, WAN, and saturation drills.
requirements.threshold: All required exact-release drills and two independent exit observations
requirements.observed: No qualifying drills exist.

requirements.description: Independent builders and hardware vendors reproduce all released targets and runtime envelopes.
requirements.threshold: Two independent builders plus all required platform and hardware coverage
requirements.observed: No qualifying independent builder or vendor attestations exist.

requirements.description: Every exact protocol-v2 lower gate is cryptographically passed and immutable.
requirements.threshold: G0, G1, G2, G3, GENESIS, and G4 all validate as PASSED
requirements.observed: All lower gates remain BLOCKED.

requirements.description: Every actionable claim has complete exact-revision implementation and fresh evidence.
requirements.threshold: Every required claim passes its real falsifier and rollback; registry disposition replay is forbidden
requirements.observed: No complete protocol-v2 claim/evidence matrix exists.

requirements.description: Independent build, consensus, security, cryptographic, economic, and operations reviews.
requirements.threshold: All exact-version reviews complete with zero unresolved severity-1 findings
requirements.observed: No qualifying final reviews exist.

requirements.description: Live operator, custodian, executor, verifier, builder, region, provider, and demand diversity.
requirements.threshold: Every frozen diversity and failover floor is met by real independently controlled organizations
requirements.observed: Required production ecosystem and real demand do not exist as verified evidence.

requirements.description: Multiparty signatures bind the exact ledger, release, genesis, evidence, control, and cutover bytes.
requirements.threshold: All required roles sign identical bytes only after every other G5 predicate passes
requirements.observed: No production sign-off or cutover authorization exists.

owner_decisions.description: Sign protocol/API/peer v2 identity, chain and genesis constants, and V1 predecessor acceptance.
Name organizations, keys, deputies, thresholds, separation-of-duty, and escalation paths for every v2 authority.
Sign production economics and all five nonzero WWM baseline/horizon coverage policies.
Authorize production domains and origins only after signed G5 cutover.

external_blockers.description: Independent review of v2 identity, schemas, domains, bounds, authority, rollback, and negative vectors.
Independent public operators, red team, audits, and real public durations.
External 180-day canary and independently observed disable/recovery drills.
Independent operators, custodians, executors, verifiers, builders, auditors, hardware vendors, and real demand.
external_blockers.resolution_artifact: signed audit, diversity, capacity, and reproduction evidence
